findings.title: NestleModel unauth predict endpoint (twin Azure deployment)
findings.description: BentoML service NestleModel (version lj4jk4akzolo3nnv) on 132.220.174.201:3000 exposes /predict endpoint without auth. Full OpenAPI schema at /docs.json reveals geo-prediction ML model with lat/lon input. Identical deployment on 57.153.31.12:3000. Auth: none (BentoML access_authorization=False default). CVEs: CVE-2025-27520 CVE-2025-32375 CVE-2026-44345 CVE-2026-44346.

findings.title: FluxBaseService:dev unauth image generation endpoints (txt2img, img2img)
findings.description: BentoML 1.4.29 service FluxBaseService:dev on 112.186.25.154:443 exposes /txt2img and /img2img inference endpoints without auth. FLUX AI image generation model. Dev environment deployed on internet-facing TLS host. Full API surface exposed via /docs.json.

findings.title: TwilioChatBot:dev unauth /chat/start_call endpoint
findings.description: BentoML 1.4.23 service TwilioChatBot:dev on 34.21.42.254:3000 exposes /chat/start_call endpoint without auth. Dev environment publicly accessible. The endpoint initiates Twilio voice calls, enabling abuse of Twilio account credentials and call quota if auth not enforced upstream.

findings.title: semantic_cache_service unauth /get_cache_data endpoint (LLM query cache leak)
findings.description: BentoML 1.1.10 service semantic_cache_service on 34.145.61.91:3000 exposes /get_cache_data endpoint without auth. Semantic cache stores and retrieves prior LLM query-response pairs. Unauthenticated access enables bulk enumeration of cached queries (potential PII/sensitive prompt leak).

findings.title: rakuten_text_service docs open despite JWT claim, /predict exposed
findings.description: BentoML service rakuten_text_service on 87.106.198.114:3000. Service description states JWT-protected but /docs.json is publicly accessible revealing full OpenAPI schema including /predict and /predict_batch endpoints. Corporate operator (Rakuten attribution from service name).

findings.title: Unauth Docker Registry exposing fintech UI image (aimsb-fintech-onboarding-ui)
findings.description: Docker Registry on 167.99.61.150:5000 returns /v2/_catalog without auth revealing one repository: aimsb-fintech-onboarding-ui. Registry belongs to a fintech onboarding platform. Image pull without credentials enabled.
